zh.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall於1245年出生在英國藍卡爾哈爾薩爾。她於1250年之前與Hugh De Worthington在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1280年在她的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall于1245年出生在英国藍卡爾哈爾薩爾。她于1250年之前与Hugh De Worthington在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1280年在她的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Halsall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire named Halsall, from an Old English personal name Hæle + halh ‘nook of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Denise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

variants.name: Denyse
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall was born in 1245, in Halsall, Lancashire, England. She married Hugh De Worthington before 1250, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1280, in her hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall est née en 1245, à Halsall, Lancashire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Hugh De Worthington avant 1250, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall wurde 1245 in Halsall, Lancashire, England geboren. Sie hat vor 1250 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Hugh De Worthington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall è nata il nel 1245 nel Halsall, Lancashire, England. Lei sposato Hugh De Worthington prima del 1250, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsallは1245年にイギリスランカシュアイアハルサルで生まれた。1250年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでHugh De Worthingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1280年に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall(은)는 1245년 영국 랭카실르 할사에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1250년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Hugh De Worthington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall nasceu em 1245, em Halsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Hugh De Worthington antes 1250, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall родилась в 1245 г. в местности холсалл, ланкашир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh De Worthington перед 1250 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1280 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Denise de Halsall nació en 1245, en Halsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Hugh De Worthington antes de 1250, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
